verses.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good; For His mercy is everlasting.
verses.2: Let Israel say, “His mercy is everlasting.”
verses.3: Oh let the house of Aaron say, “His mercy is everlasting.”
verses.4: Let those who fear the LORD say, “His mercy is everlasting.”
verses.5: From my distress I called upon the LORD; The LORD answered me and put me in an open space.
verses.6: The LORD is for me; I will not fear; What can man do to me?
verses.7: The LORD is for me among those who help me; Therefore I will look with satisfaction on those who hate me.
verses.8: It is better to take refuge in the LORD Than to trust in people.
verses.9: It is better to take refuge in the LORD Than to trust in noblemen.
verses.10: All nations surrounded me; In the name of the LORD I will certainly fend them off.
verses.11: They surrounded me, yes, they surrounded me; In the name of the LORD I will certainly fend them off.
verses.12: They surrounded me like bees; They were extinguished like a fire of thorn bushes; In the name of the LORD I will certainly fend them off.
verses.13: You pushed me violently so that I was falling, But the LORD helped me.
verses.14: The LORD is my strength and song, And He has become my salvation.
verses.15: The sound of joyful shouting and salvation is in the tents of the righteous; The right hand of the LORD performs valiantly.
verses.16: The right hand of the LORD is exalted; The right hand of the LORD performs valiantly.
verses.17: I will not die, but live, And tell of the works of the LORD.
verses.18: The LORD has disciplined me severely, But He has not turned me over to death.
verses.19: Open the gates of righteousness to me; I will enter through them, I will give thanks to the LORD.
verses.20: This is the gate of the LORD; The righteous will enter through it.
verses.21: I will give thanks to You, for You have answered me, And You have become my salvation.
verses.22: A stone which the builders rejected Has become the chief cornerstone.
verses.23: This came about from the LORD; It is marvelous in our eyes.
verses.24: This is the day which the LORD has made; Let’s rejoice and be glad in it.
verses.25: Please, O LORD, do save us; Please, O LORD, do send prosperity!
verses.26: Blessed is the one who comes in the name of the LORD; We have blessed you from the house of the LORD.
verses.27: The LORD is God, and He has given us light; Bind the festival sacrifice to the horns of the altar with cords.
verses.28: You are my God, and I give thanks to You; You are my God, I exalt You.
verses.29: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good; For His mercy is everlasting.
